summary: The authors introduce Gyan, a non-transformer, neuro-symbolic language model that decouples knowledge acquisition from representation to eliminate hallucinations and improve interpretability, achieving SOTA performance on multiple datasets.

blocks.content: Gyan: An Explainable Neuro-Symbolic Language Model

source_span.quote: # Gyan: An Explainable Neuro-Symbolic Language Model

blocks.content: Here, we describe Gyan, an explainable language model based on a novel non-transformer architecture, without any of these limitations.

source_span.quote: Here, we describe Gyan, an explainable language model based on a novel non-transformer architecture, without any of these limitations.

blocks.content: Besides, by the very nature of the architecture, these models hallucinate, are difficult to maintain, are not easily interpretable and require enormous compute resources for training and inference.

source_span.quote: Besides, by the very nature of the architecture, these models hallucinate, are difficult to maintain, are not easily interpretable and require enormous compute resources for training and inference.

blocks.content: The novel architecture decouples the language model from knowledge acquisition and representation.

source_span.quote: The novel architecture decouples the language model from knowledge acquisition and representation.

blocks.content: Gyan achieves SOTA performance on 3 widely cited data sets and superior performance on two proprietary data sets.

source_span.quote: Gyan achieves SOTA performance on 3 widely cited data sets and superior performance on two proprietary data sets.

blocks.content: The model draws on rhetorical structure theory, semantic role theory and knowledge-based computational linguistics.

source_span.quote: The model draws on rhetorical structure theory, semantic role theory and knowledge-based computational linguistics.

blocks.content: Gyan's meaning representation structure captures the complete compositional context and attempts to mimic humans by expanding the context to a 'world model'.

source_span.quote: Gyan's meaning representation structure captures the complete compositional context and attempts to mimic humans by expanding the context to a 'world model'.

blocks.content: Collectively, our results demonstrate that it is possible to create models which are trustable and reliable for mission critical tasks.

source_span.quote: Collectively, our results demonstrate that it is possible to create models which are trustable and reliable for mission critical tasks.
